# CANDIDATE: SNIPER_PULLBACK_PARAM_SWEEP

**Filed:** 2026-05-25
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** filter_change
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

Optimizing the V_pullback entry parameters (wait-window, retest-proximity, bounce-confirmation) will increase the edge capture on both the missed week (4/4) and the J-anchor window by better aligning entries with genuine pullback bounces and reducing false entries on noisy retests.

## Mechanism

The V_pullback entry waits for up to N bars (wait-window) for price to retest the broken level within a proximity band (retest-proximity: level +/- X dollars), then enters on a bounce defined as either the bar that touches the level (touch) or the next bar closing in the direction of the trend (next in-dir bar). We sweep N in {3,4,6,8,10}, proximity in {0.10,0.20,0.30,0.40}, and bounce-confirmation in {touch, next in-dir bar} using real OPRA fills.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+ account; $1K paper account ~= 14% of headline P&L (based on risk rules: 50% per-trade cap, min 3 contracts).
2. **Sample bias:** The sweep uses the missed week (4/4) and J-anchor window (6 days) for selection, which is a very small sample (7 days) and high overfit risk. The knob set that maximizes days-green on these 7 days may not generalize.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (no walk-forward held-out window performed yet)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (real OPRA fills to be used in the sweep, but the sweep itself needs validation on real fills for the selected knob set)
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: if the knob set causes entries on false retests, could turn winner days into losers; max drawdown scenario: consecutive losses on choppy days; blow-up scenario: excessive entries on high-volume reversal days leading to multiple stops.
6. **Concentration:** If the selected knob set performs well on only 1-2 days, those days could represent >100% of P&L; we will disclose top-5 days concentration after backtest.

## Pre-merge gate

Stage-1 backtest on the missed week and J-anchor window to select knob set; then walk-forward analysis on prior 3 months; real-fills validation on top 3 J days; gym validators for entry logic.

## Confidence

2 / 10 -- No backtest results available; proposal is based on sweep concept only.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Does not conflict with existing candidates as it tunes a different parameter set (V_pullback entry) and complements candidates that are watcher gates or exit changes.
